<!--
Keep this tight. Summary + Why should read fine standalone, without the
PR link or the diff open next to them — this file doubles as release-notes
material later, so write for a reader six months from now, not for someone
mid-review. Delete these instructional comments and any section that has
nothing to say (don't write "N/A") before submitting.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed, in plain language. Not a file list — the diff already shows that. -->

## Why

<!-- The rationale: REQ/ADR ID, the bug report, or the product decision this addresses. Not the play-by-play of how you got there. -->

## How

<!-- Only if the approach isn't obvious from the diff — a non-obvious trade-off, an alternative considered and rejected, a boundary you deliberately respected. Skip for straightforward changes. -->

## Agents involved

<!--
Optional — include only when it adds real signal (which agent owned
which part, in case something needs a follow-up from the right lane).
One line per agent, not a transcript:
  - `backend-implementer` — implemented X
  - `quality-architect` — refactored Y, closed a test-coverage gap in Z
Omit this whole section for small or single-agent changes.
-->

## Testing & docs

<!-- What ran, and where (this sandbox vs. CI-only) — never claim a suite passed if it only ran in CI. Which docs were updated, or state plainly why none needed to change. -->
